_comment: Baseline resume for the Lolo Job Hunt resume builder. resume.html fetches this on first load, and offers to reload it whenever this file changes. Edits Lolo makes in the browser live in localStorage and are never overwritten without her say-so. Shape follows the Reactive Resume schema (MIT).

basics.name: Baivaba Panigrahi
basics.headline: Master of Laboratory Medicine · Customer service & healthcare professional

summary.title: Summary
summary.content: Friendly, reliable and highly adaptable medical graduate relocating to Melbourne to commence a Master of Laboratory Medicine at RMIT University. Experienced in fast-paced healthcare environments requiring exceptional communication, teamwork, customer service, problem solving and attention to detail. Seeking part-time employment in retail, customer service, administration, hospitality or university support roles while pursuing postgraduate studies.

items.school: GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research
items.degree: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS)
items.description:
Gold Medallist in Forensic Medicine
Distinctions in Pathology, ENT and Forensic Medicine

Delivered professional support to patients and families in a high-pressure environment
Coordinated effectively with doctors, nurses and administrative staff
Managed competing priorities while maintaining accuracy and professionalism

items.position: Junior Resident & Registered Medical Officer — Clinical Haematology
items.description:
Assisted patients with enquiries and care coordination
Demonstrated strong organisation, communication and teamwork skills
Worked efficiently under pressure while maintaining service quality

Worked with people from diverse backgrounds
Participated in community outreach and health camps
Developed strong interpersonal and customer-facing communication skills

items.name: Customer service
items.keywords: Client support, professional communication, conflict resolution

items.name: Working with people
items.keywords: Teamwork and collaboration, adaptability and reliability, working under pressure

items.name: Organisation
items.keywords: Time management, problem solving, data entry and record management

availability.title: Availability
availability.content:
Available for weekday, evening, weekend and public holiday shifts
Eligible to work under Australian Student Visa conditions
Referees available on request
